Frequently Asked Questions

Questions you may have about our services and cooperation process

What types of precision hardware services do you offer?

We offer one-stop services including precision hardware mold design and development, hardware component mass production, industrial machinery customization, non-standard precision hardware processing, and hardware product import/export trade.

What is the custom mold process?

The process includes: requirements discussion and planning → 3D design and simulation → mold manufacturing and precision machining → trial molding and quality inspection → delivery and technical support.

What is the minimum order quantity?

We support flexible solutions from small batch prototypes to large-scale production. Minimum order quantity depends on product complexity and process requirements. Please inquire about specific projects.

What precision standards can you achieve?

Our precision machining accuracy reaches ±0.01mm, with higher precision customization available based on client requirements.

How long is the typical production cycle?

Production cycles vary by complexity. Mold design and manufacturing typically takes 15-45 days, hardware component production 7-30 days. Specific timelines are determined during project evaluation.

Do you provide after-sales service?

Yes, we provide comprehensive technical support and after-sales service, including mold maintenance guidance, technical consultation, and product usage training to ensure the best user experience.
